data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will edge closer to the coast of southern China gradually today and tomorrow. There will be more showers over the region. The trough of low pressure is expected to linger over the vicinity of the coast of Guangdong and the northern part of the South China Sea early to midweek next week. Meanwhile, under the influence of an active southwest monsoon and upper-air disturbances, there will be occasional heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. With the subtropical ridge over the western North Pacific extending westwards in the latter part of next week, showers will ease off and the weather will improve over Guangdong towards the weekend.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260613","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"Southeast force 4 to 5, becoming southwest force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground later.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and thunderstorms.
